leadText: Torch Song (Japanese: フレアソング Flare Song) is a damage-dealing Fire-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of Skeledirge.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Torch Song is a sound-based move . It inflicts damage and raises the user's Special Attack by one stage. Torch Song can hit Pokémon even if they are behind a substitute .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user blows out raging flames as if singing a song, scorching the target. This also boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Torch Song is the only Fire-type sound-based move .
